summary.title: Ghost Liner ~Mystery of the Phantom Ship~
summary.desc:
**[What kind of game is this?]**
Players are divided into the **[Human Faction]** and the **[Charon Faction]** in this social deduction game. Enjoy psychological warfare of deception at first, and a 'logic puzzle' where all contradictions are revealed at the end.

**[Victory Conditions]**
🧑‍🤝‍🧑 **Human Faction Victory**
* Steer the ship in the Bridge and accumulate the target [O pt]!
* Exile all [Charons] lurking on the ship!

💀 **Charon Faction Victory**
* Interfere with the steering and accumulate the target [X pt]!
* Reduce the number of humans so that [half or more] of the survivors are Charons!

**[Game Basics (Daily Flow)]**
Repeat the [1 to 4 cycle] below every day until a winner is decided.
1. Morning Discussion: Discuss 'where to go today' and decide each person's destination.
2. Charon's Secret Talk: Charons talk privately and secretly choose an attack target.
3. Day Action: Reveal destinations simultaneously! Activate the destination effects of players who were not attacked by Charon.
4. Night Exile: Everyone discusses and exiles a suspicious player.

navigator.title: 🧭 Role: Navigator (Human Faction)
navigator.desc:
**[Ability]**
* Navigators can know each other. (Default rule)
* Must play the [Bridge] destination card. Must play [O] in the Bridge.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
💡 **Navigator's Guide**
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
**[Early Game] Dangerous but most trusted position**
* Since you can only go to the Bridge, you will eventually be identified, but your words carry the most weight. Try your best to find the enemy faction.
* Lead discussions in favor of the Human faction with your fellow Navigators.

**[Late Game] Protect your allies even as a Ghost**
* If the rule allows Navigators to know each other, a simultaneous coming-out in the late game is effective. You can quickly clear up the board state.
* If you are eliminated and become a Ghost, overwrite the other Navigator's destination to the 'Lounge' to protect them from Charon's attack, or change a Charon's destination to the 'Lounge' to prevent them from playing [X].

passenger.title: 🧑‍💼 Role: Passenger (Human Faction)
passenger.desc:
**[Ability]**
* No special ability. You can choose your destination freely.
* If you go to the Bridge, you must play [O].

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
💡 **Passenger's Guide**
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
**[Early Game] Steadily accumulate O points**
* Adjust the number of people going to the Bridge. If there are too many, it will be hard to identify Charon when [X] is played. If too few, the real Navigators will be exposed early.
* To protect the Navigators, act as a pseudo-Navigator to make Charon hesitate to attack.
* Utilize your majority to monopolize the Library for the Human faction.

**[Late Game] Corner Charon with information**
* The longer the turns drag on, the more information increases, favoring the Human faction.
* When O points are close to victory, Charon will panic and play [X]. It is effective to intentionally avoid the Bridge to flush Charon out.

charon.title: 💀 Role: Charon (Charon Faction)
charon.desc:
**[Ability]**
* Charons know each other. You can choose your destination freely.
* If you go to the Bridge, you may play [X] instead of [O].
* Only when you play [Lounge], you can attack any 1 person.
⚠️However, if the target was also in the [Lounge], the attack fails and you are eliminated instead. Charons cannot attack each other.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
💡 **Charon's Guide**
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
**[Early Game] Stay hidden and find the Navigators!**
* Charon's basic strategy is to play [X] in the Bridge. This guarantees the steering fails for that turn. Steadily accumulate X points for victory.
* It is dangerous for 2 Charons to go to the Bridge together. If both play [X], the suspects are narrowed down quickly.
* Find the Navigators. They always go to the Bridge, so they will naturally be revealed over time. It's safer to hold off attacking until you identify them.

**[Late Game] Aim for victory by X points!**
* Aim for a state with '2 surviving Charons & 1 X pt away from victory'. If you create this state, you can forcefully play [X] the next day and secure a point victory.
* Depending on the situation, you may actively attack to aim for a victory by numbers. It is important to flexibly change your victory route.

hades.title: 👑 Role: Hades (Charon Faction)
hades.desc:
**[Ability]**
* Unilaterally knows who the Charons are (Does not participate in Charon's secret talk).
* You can choose your destination freely. If you go to the Bridge, you must play [O].

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
💡 **Hades's Guide**
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
**[Early/Late Game] Commander guiding the discussion**
* The only role that accurately knows both Human and Charon factions. Disrupt the Human faction with your words.
* It's powerful to claim 'I'm going to the Library' but not actually go, causing the Library to malfunction.
* Pay attention to Charon's words and actions. If Charon goes to the Bridge, Hades should also go to the Bridge and play [O]. If Charon stays in the Lounge, Hades should also stay in the Lounge.

ghost.title: 👻 Eliminated: About Ghosts
ghost.desc:
**[Ability]**
* Players eliminated from the game become this role. Speaking or gesturing is prohibited.
* No voting rights in the Night Exile.
* Every day, you can **overwrite any 1 person's destination with your [Lounge] card**.
* ⚠️However, the overwritten person cannot be overwritten by any Ghost on the 'next day'.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
💡 **Ghost's Guide**
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
* You cannot speak, but support your original faction with your actions.
* If Human, stop Charon's movements or protect allies.
* If Charon, kick troublesome humans out of the Library or Bridge.

bridge.title: ⚓ Destination: Bridge
bridge.desc:
**[Effect] Important place to move the ship**

Activates when the specified 'Required Number' or more players go.
Players going to the Bridge simultaneously play one [O] card, but Charons can choose to play one [X] instead.

* If everyone plays [O], the total amount is added to **[O pt]**.
* If even one [X] is mixed in, [O] is not added, and the number of [X] cards played is added to **[X pt]**.

Example
If 4 people go to the Bridge and play 4 [O]s, add 4 to [O pt].
If 6 people go and play 5 [O]s and 1 [X], add 1 to [X pt] (No addition to O pt).
If 5 people go and play 3 [O]s and 2 [X]s, add 2 to [X pt] (No addition to O pt).

* If the required number is not met, this process is skipped. The played O/X cards are not revealed, and +1 is unconditionally added to [X pt].

library.title: 📖 Destination: Library
library.desc:
**[Effect] The truth is revealed to only one**

* Can be used **only once per game** for each player.
* You can check the role card of any 1 person (including eliminated players) **privately**.
* You may freely talk about what you saw, but you cannot show your screen to others.

* If multiple people choose the Library, the effect does not activate. Even if the number is exceeded, the card is consumed and can never be used again in that game.

lounge.title: 🛋️ Destination: Lounge
lounge.desc:
**[Effect] Rest and deadly tactics**

* Nullifies attacks from Charon, and **conversely eliminates the attacking Charon** from the game (Counter).
* Only when Charon plays [Lounge] themselves, they can attack another player.

breakdown.title: 📊 Roles and Settings by Player Count
breakdown.desc:
**[Recommended Settings]**

* **5 Players:** 1 Navigator / 2 Passengers / 1 Charon / 1 Hades
  Bridge Req: 2, Library: Off, Ghosts: Off

* **6 Players:** 1 Navigator / 3 Passengers / 1 Charon / 1 Hades
  Bridge Req: 2, Library: Off, Ghosts: Off

* **7 Players:** 2 Navigators / 3 Passengers / 2 Charons / 0 Hades
  Bridge Req: 3, Library: Off

* **8 Players:** 2 Navigators / 3 Passengers / 2 Charons / 1 Hades
  Bridge Req: 3

* **9 Players:** 2 Navigators / 4 Passengers / 2 Charons / 1 Hades
  Bridge Req: 3

faq.title: ❓ FAQ
faq.desc:
**Q. If O/X pt reaches the target during the Day Bridge, does the game end immediately?**
A. No. The headcount processing from the 'Night Exile' takes priority. Only if the game doesn't end by headcount, it moves to the O/X pt victory check.

**Q. If multiple people play Library and fail to go, can the card be used again?**
A. No, once a Library card is revealed, it cannot be used again. However, if it was overwritten by a Ghost and not revealed, it can be used again.

**Q. Can 2 Charons each attack 1 person?**
A. Yes. Meaning if there are 2 Charons, a maximum of 2 people can be attacked on the same day.

**Q. If I become a Ghost, can I look at other players' role cards?**
A. No, you cannot. Unless your original role was Charon, please keep your eyes closed during Charon's secret talk as well.

**Q. When a Ghost overwrites a destination, is the original destination revealed?**
A. No, it is not revealed.

**Q. If there are multiple Ghosts, can they each block 1 person?**
A. Yes. 3 Ghosts can block up to 3 people.

**Q. Can a Ghost block every day?**
A. Yes. However, a blocked person cannot be blocked by any Ghost on the 'next day'.

concept.title: 💡 Basic Strategy
concept.desc:
Playable with 5-6, but recommended for 7-13 players. More players offer deeper strategic gameplay.

In beginner playtests, attacks occurred frequently. This game is designed to have higher penalties for attacking (by Charon or Night Exile) than traditional social deduction games, to reduce player elimination. Consciously refrain from attacking and aim for a point victory.

Human faction tends to be stronger at first. If so, introduce rules to weaken Humans ('Navigators don't know each other') or strengthen Charons ('Charon and Hades know each other'). Increasing the Bridge Required Number by 1 or adjusting victory points is also effective.

siren.title: 🧜 Role: Siren (Charon Faction)
siren.desc:
※This is a Discord-only special role.

**[Abilities]**
・You secretly know who the Charons are (you do not join the Charons' secret talk).
・You may freely choose your destination. If you go to the Bridge, you must play [O].
・Only on a day you secretly chose the Bridge, you may overwrite one player's destination to [Bridge]+[O].
・The Siren who performs the overwrite is not revealed, but the overwritten player is revealed (shown as 🧜Bridge (charmed by the Siren) in that day's action results).
・You can do this any number of times, but once a player has been overwritten they can no longer be overwritten by any Siren. Sirens cannot overwrite one another or themselves.
・Ghost interference takes priority. If a ghost's overwrite prevents yours, the use is not consumed.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🧜 **Siren Strategy Guide**
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
**[Early & Late Game] The commander who steers the discussion**
・You accurately know the Human and Charon factions. Use your words to sow confusion among the Humans.
・You can forcibly drag a player heading to the Library out to the Bridge. Pull out the loud players who insist on their divination target and break the Library monopoly. Claiming "I'll go to the Library" and then not going—wasting a turn—is also effective.
・Watch the Charons' words and actions. On a day a Charon goes to the Bridge, the Siren should also go to the Bridge and play [O]; on a day a Charon stays in the Lounge, the Siren should also stay in the Lounge.
・However, using your ability narrows it down that one of the Bridge members is the Siren. Choose your moment wisely.

role_desc.navigator: - Must go to the [Bridge] and must play [O].
role_desc.passenger:
- No special ability.
- Can choose destination freely.
- If going to the Bridge, must play [O].
role_desc.charon:
- Can choose destination freely.
- If going to the Bridge, may play [X] instead of [O].
- On the day you go to the Lounge, you may attack 1 person. Attack succeeds if target is in Bridge or Library (target eliminated). If target is in Lounge, attack fails (you are eliminated).
- Charons cannot attack each other.
role_desc.hades:
- Can choose destination freely.
- If going to the Bridge, must play [O].
role_desc.siren:
・You secretly know who the Charons are (you do not join the Charons' secret talk).
・You may freely choose your destination. If you go to the Bridge, you must play [O].
・Only on a day you secretly chose the Bridge, you may overwrite one player's destination to [Bridge]+[O].
・You can do this any number of times, but once a player has been overwritten they can no longer be overwritten by any Siren. Sirens cannot overwrite one another or themselves.
・Ghost interference takes priority. If a ghost's overwrite prevents yours, the use is not consumed.

msg.day_result_desc: Daily actions are recorded in the log.
msg.vote_night_desc_active:
Discuss and vote using the button below. A player receiving half or more of the survivors' votes will be exiled and become a Ghost.
(Discussion started <t:{start_time}:R>)

**[Current Votes: {current}/{total} players]**
{lines}

* Only survivors can vote. Everyone must vote, including abstentions.
* Ties result in no exile and no re-vote.
* If forced to end, non-voters will abstain.
msg.vote_all_done:
**All votes are in.**
Host, please proceed to 'Exile & Result Check'.
msg.vote_forced:
**Voting was forced to end.**
Host, please proceed to 'Exile & Result Check'.
msg.exile_none: No one was exiled this night.
msg.tension_2:
⚖️ **The fate of the Ghost Liner...**
**Is the final destination Life or Death...?**
msg.win_reason_charon_dead: All Charons have been wiped out.
msg.win_reason_charon_half: Charons now make up half or more of the survivors.
msg.win_reason_c_pt: O points have reached the required amount ({pt}pt).
msg.win_reason_x_pt: X points have reached the required amount ({pt}pt).
msg.win_not_yet: The fate of the Ghost Liner is not yet decided.
msg.game_over:
**Game Over! Good job everyone!**
(* The room has automatically disbanded. You can start the next game right away with `/play`)
msg.day_start_desc:
Discuss and submit your actions using the button below.
(Discussion started <t:{start_time}:R>)

**[Current Submissions: {current}/{total} players]**
{lines}

* Morning discussion ends automatically when everyone submits.
* If forced to end, non-submitting survivors will go to the Lounge, and Ghosts will not block.
msg.charon_timer_start_desc:
Charons, unmute and talk freely.
Time remaining: <t:{end_time}:R>
msg.charon_phase_desc:
**Non-Charons, please mute your mics and speakers.**
Host, set the time and click 'Start Charon's Secret Talk'.
msg.attack_status_desc:
・Charon can attack only when they themselves chose the Lounge.
・Even if Charons don't attack, select 'Input Attack' -> 'Do not attack'.
・Non-Charons must also select 'Do not attack'.

[Current Submissions: {current}/{total} players]

* Ghosts have no attack rights and do not need to input.
* If forced to end, non-submitters will not attack.
msg.attack_prompt:
Charon, select an attack target. If not attacking, select 'Do not attack anyone'.
* For non-Charons, attacks will not trigger regardless of the choice.
msg.ghost_prompt:
You are a Ghost.
You can overwrite any player's destination to the Lounge. However, you cannot block a player who was blocked the previous day.
msg.setup_detail_desc: Set victory points and Bridge required number.
msg.dm_navigator_alone: Fellow Navigators: You are the only one.
msg.dm_navigator_unknown: Fellow Navigators: You do not know each other.
msg.dm_charon_alone: Fellow Charons: You are the only one.
msg.dm_charon_unknown: Fellow Charons: You do not know each other.
msg.dm_spectate_on:
**Ghost Liner (Spectator)**
**[Spectator Mode: All Players' Roles]**
{list}
* Spectators must not interfere with gameplay or discussions (chat/voice).
msg.dm_spectate_off:
**Ghost Liner (Spectator)**
Based on the host's settings, role disclosure to spectators is currently 'OFF'. Enjoy deducing on your own.

Type `/rules` to check the rules.
You can change your display language with `/language`.
msg.reset_success: The game state in this channel has been reset.
msg.cleanup_msg: ⌛ **The game was automatically ended (reset) due to no activity for 24 hours.**

:hearts:  **Physical Card Edition Available!**
If you enjoyed the game, please check out the physical version on BOOTH!
International shipping is fully supported via official forwarding services like Buyee, so you can purchase it from overseas without any issues!
🔗 {shop_url}
msg.action_prompt_common:
You are a 【{role}】
- Select your destination

* Non-Charon players going to the Bridge automatically play 1 [O].
* Only Charon may play 1 [X] instead of [O] at the Bridge.
* If everyone at the Bridge plays [O], that number is added to [O pt]. If even 1 [X] is mixed in, nothing is added to [O pt] and the number of [X] is added to [X pt]. If the required number of players is not met, 1 is added to [X pt].
* Cannot be changed once submitted.

Current Points (Bridge Required: {need} players)
O: {c_bar} ({c_pt} / {win_c} pt)
X: {x_bar} ({x_pt} / {win_x} pt)
msg.attack_invalid_warn: * Your attack will be invalid because you did not choose the Lounge.
msg.dm_failed: ⚠️ Could not send a DM to {name}. Please check their privacy settings.
msg.pref_prompt:
[You are already registered]
Before the host closes recruitment, you can choose a "role you want" and a "role you don't want" (each optional, up to 1).
* Effective only when the host turns on "Apply Role Preferences".
* Any field left blank is treated as no preference.
* Your preference is not guaranteed.
msg.pref_set: Your role preference has been set to 【{role}】. You can change it any time until recruitment closes.
msg.attack_prompt_siren:
Charons and Sirens, please choose your target.
If you will not attack/interfere, choose "Attack/interfere with no one".
* A Charon's choice automatically becomes an attack; a Siren's choice automatically becomes interference.
* For players who are neither Charon nor Siren, no attack/interference occurs no matter what you pick.
msg.attack_end_title_siren: 🗡️ Charon's Attack / Siren's Interference has ended
msg.submit_mermaid_target: Submitted [{target}] as your interference target (lured to the Bridge).
msg.mermaid_invalid_warn: * Your interference is invalid because you did not choose the Bridge.
msg.dm_siren_alone: Fellow Sirens: You are the only one.
msg.attack_status_desc_siren:
・Charon can attack only when they themselves chose the Lounge.
・Siren can interfere only when they themselves chose the Bridge.
・Even if Charons/Sirens do not act, select 'Enter attack/interference' -> 'Attack/interfere with no one'.
・Non-Charon/Siren players must also select 'Attack/interfere with no one'.

[Current Submissions: {current}/{total} players]

* Ghosts have no attack/interference rights and do not need to input.
* If forced to end, non-submitters will neither attack nor interfere.
